field.label: Tunnel Token
field.help: The token for your Cloudflare Tunnel.

field.label: Disable PMTU Discovery
field.help: Disable PMTU discovery for QUIC. Recommended on FreeBSD/OPNsense.

field.label: Max Socket Buffer (kern.ipc.maxsockbuf)
field.help: Recommended value for QUIC performance. Default is 16777216.

field.label: UDP Recv Space (net.inet.udp.recvspace)
field.help: Recommended value for QUIC performance. Default is 8388608.
